
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Water Dragon|kanji=壬辰|romaji=mizunoe tatsu|onyomi=jishin|p=rénchén|w=jen-ch'en|mi=ʐən³⁵ ʈ͡ʂʰən|y=jam4 san4|j=jam4 san4|ci=jɐm sɐn|mc=ɲiɪm ɖin|oc-bs=ɲɨm ɖiŋ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Water Dragon also known as 壬辰''' (mizu no etatsu, jinsui no tatsu, jinshin) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q246658}}.

It is the 29th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Xinmao|ja|1=Yin Metal Rabbit|2=ja|辛卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinmao|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinmao|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Guisi|ja|癸巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guisi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Yin Water Snake|qid=Q905297}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|qid=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Water|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Water|13=User:Immanuelle/Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|qq=}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|qid=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}} symbol {{ill|Dragon|ja|辰|1=chén|lt=Dragon (辰)|2=ja|3=辰|1=Dragon (zodiac)|lt=Dragon (辰)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Dragon (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Dragon (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q16538966}} represents yang {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=Mutual Restraint|lt_ja=相剋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q218652}}) (i.e. Earth overcomes Water).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Water Dragon (壬辰)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénchén
** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 san4
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoe-tatsu
***Kunyomi 2: Jinsui-no-tatsu
***Onyomi 1: jinshin
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): imjin (임진)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Thìn

==Years of Yang Water Dragon==
A year in the {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|qid=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} that leaves a remainder of 32 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|Year|en|Year|qid=Q577|lt=year|1=Year}} of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

That is, if a Western calendar year N (N>0) is a year of Renchin, then

<math> N - \lfloor{N/60}\rfloor * 60 = 32 </math>
Here, the symbol <math> \lfloor x \rfloor</math> denotes the {{ill|Floor function|ja|床関数|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Floor function|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Floor function|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=床関数と天井関数|1=Floor and ceiling functions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q215193}}.

{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Yang Water Dragon (壬辰)'s years table'''
|-
! {{ill|1st millennium|en|1st millennium|qid=Q25868|lt=1st Millennium|1=1st millennium}} !! {{ill|2nd millennium|en|2nd millennium|qid=Q25860|lt=2nd Millennium|1=2nd millennium}} !! {{ill|3rd millennium|en|3rd millennium|qid=Q26224|lt=3rd Millennium|1=3rd millennium}}
|-
|
* {{ill|AD 32|en|AD 32|qid=Q23778|lt=32 AD|1=AD 32}}
* {{ill|AD 92|en|AD 92|qid=Q31444|lt=92 AD|1=AD 92}}
* {{ill|152|en|152|qid=Q30023|lt=152 AD|1=152}}
* {{ill|212|en|212|qid=Q32974|lt=212 AD|1=212}}
* {{ill|272|en|272|qid=Q31262|lt=272 AD|1=272}}
* {{ill|332|en|332|qid=Q31568|lt=332 AD|1=332}}
* {{ill|392|en|392|qid=Q48117|lt=392 AD|1=392}}
* {{ill|452|en|452|qid=Q30445|lt=452 AD|1=452}}
* {{ill|512|en|512|qid=Q31993|lt=512 AD|1=512}}
* {{ill|572|en|572|qid=Q49189|lt=572 AD|1=572}}
* {{ill|632|en|632|qid=Q23887|lt=632 AD|1=632}}
* {{ill|692|en|692|qid=Q23477|lt=692 AD|1=692}}
* {{ill|752|en|752|qid=Q23639|lt=752 AD|1=752}}
* {{ill|812|en|812|qid=Q31114|lt=812 AD|1=812}}
* {{ill|872|en|872|qid=Q30368|lt=872 AD|1=872}}
* {{ill|932|en|932|qid=Q23656|lt=932 AD|1=932}}
* {{ill|992|en|992|qid=Q23724|lt=992 AD|1=992}}
|
* {{ill|1052|en|1052|qid=Q19366|lt=1052 AD|1=1052}}
* {{ill|1112|en|1112|qid=Q19525|lt=1112 AD|1=1112}}
* {{ill|1172|en|1172|qid=Q19687|lt=1172 AD|1=1172}}
* {{ill|1232|en|1232|qid=Q5418|lt=1232 AD|1=1232}}
* {{ill|1292|en|1292|qid=Q5555|lt=1292 AD|1=1292}}
* {{ill|1352|en|1352|qid=Q6112|lt=1352 AD|1=1352}}
* {{ill|1412|en|1412|qid=Q6162|lt=1412 AD|1=1412}}
* {{ill|1472|en|1472|qid=Q6589|lt=1472 AD|1=1472}}
* {{ill|1532|en|1532|qid=Q6436|lt=1532 AD|1=1532}}
* {{ill|1592|en|1592|qid=Q6769|lt=1592 AD|1=1592}}
* {{ill|1652|en|1652|qid=Q6962|lt=1652 AD|1=1652}}
* {{ill|1712|en|1712|qid=Q6871|lt=1712 AD|1=1712}}
* {{ill|1772|en|1772|qid=Q7690|lt=1772 AD|1=1772}}
* {{ill|1832|en|1832|qid=Q7584|lt=1832 AD|1=1832}}
* {{ill|1892|en|1892|qid=Q7839|lt=1892 AD|1=1892}}
* {{ill|1952|en|1952|qid=Q5272|lt=1952 AD|1=1952}}
|
* {{ill|2012|en|2012|qid=Q1990|lt=2012 AD|1=2012}}
* {{ill|2072 AD|ja|2072年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2072|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2072 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=2070年代|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}
* {{ill|2132 AD|ja|2132年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2132|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2132 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=22世紀|1=22nd century|qid=Q11177}}
* {{ill|2192 AD|ja|2192年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2192|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2192 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=22世紀|1=22nd century|qid=Q11177}}
* {{ill|2252 AD|ja|2252年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2252|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2252 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=23世紀|1=23rd century|qid=Q49832}}
* {{ill|2312 AD|ja|2312年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2312|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2312 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=24世紀|1=24th century|qid=Q49838}}
* {{ill|2372 AD|ja|2372年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2372|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2372 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2432 AD|ja|2432年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2432|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2432 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2492 AD|ja|2492年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2492|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2492 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2552 AD|ja|2552年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2552|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2552 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2612 AD|ja|2612年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2612|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2612 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2672 AD|ja|2672年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2672|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2672 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2732 AD|ja|2732年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2732|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2732 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2792 AD|ja|2792年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2792|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2792 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2852 AD|ja|2852年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2852|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2852 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2912 AD|ja|2912年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2912|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2912 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2972 AD|ja|2972年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2972|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2972 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
|}

===Events===
* In {{ill|Bunroku|en|Bunroku|qid=Q1373039|lt=Bunroku|1=Bunroku}} 1 (1592 AD), the campaign known as {{ill|Bunroku Campaign|ja|文禄・慶長の役#文禄の役|lt=Bunroku Campaign|lt_ja=文禄の役|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku Campaign|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku Campaign|1=Imjin War|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q576338}} took place, which is known in Korea as the {{ill|Imjin War|ja|壬辰倭乱|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imjin War|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imjin War|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=文禄・慶長の役|1=Imjin War|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q576338}}.

==Months of Yang Water Dragon==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|qid=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|qid=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|March|en|March|qid=Q110|lt=March|1=March}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|qid=Q5151|lt=Month|1=Month}} of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|qid=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Qingming (solar term)|en|Qingming (solar term)|qid=Q1680269|lt=Qingming|1=Qingming (solar term)}} until the day before {{ill|Lixia|en|Lixia|qid=Q1191007|lt=Lixia|1=Lixia}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Water Dragon==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows.
==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu|qq=}}===
The day of {{ill|Renchin|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 9th day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11405067}}.

==See Also==
*{{prefix|qq=}}
*{{intitle|qq=}}

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yang Water Dragon|qq=ja|壬辰|version=84123798|comment=Imported full ja history}}

{{wikidata link|Q1062581|af|Waterdraak (astrologie)|cdo|Ìng-sìng|de|Wasser-Drache|fr|Dragon d'eau (astrologie)|hak|Ngìm-sìn|ja|壬辰|ko|임진|nds|Water-Draken|vi|Nhâm Thìn|za|Nyaemzsaenz|zh-min-nan|Jîm-sîn|zh-yue|壬辰|zh|壬辰|zh-min-nan|Pêng-chún|zh-yue|丙申|cdo|Yîm-cṳ̄de|nds|Holt-Affenvi|de|Yang Water Dragon|fr|Dragon de eau|af|Wateraap (astrologie)|de|Wasser-Affeneen|en|Fire Monkey|fr|Singe de feushak|it|Bing-chṳ́id|ko|병신|vi|Bính Thân|za|Bingceij|zh|丙申|ar|Yang Water Dragon}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
[[Category:Pages with interwikis with duplicate languages]]
